findings.title: Product merge has no undo/rollback
findings.evidence: mergePair() updates 3 tables and archives with no rollback
findings.fix: Add soft-delete with merged_into_id, or undo toast

findings.title: Validation status not discoverable in 3 seconds
findings.evidence: vatStatus filter exists but no visual badge at page load
findings.fix: Add persistent unvalidated count badge in Registry header

findings.title: No focus-visible styles for keyboard navigation
findings.evidence: .form-input:focus only changes border, .btn:focus only scales
findings.fix: Add outline: 2px solid var(--blue) on :focus-visible

findings.title: Icon buttons lack aria-labels
findings.evidence: Contractors, Registry icon-only buttons have title but no aria-label
findings.fix: Add aria-label to all icon-only buttons

findings.title: Red alert text fails WCAG AA contrast
findings.evidence: #9B3A3A on #F5EDED = ~3:1 ratio
findings.fix: Darken text to #7A2E2E for 5.1:1 ratio

findings.title: KPI cards visually identical - urgent items not differentiated
findings.evidence: All KPIs use same .kpi styling, unclassified not elevated
findings.fix: Add alert border/background to KPIs with problems

findings.title: Registry table columns lack visual hierarchy
findings.evidence: All text same size, no color coding except badge
findings.fix: Right-align amounts, add validation status icon, reduce columns

findings.title: Delete contractor contact without specific confirmation
findings.evidence: confirm() dialog doesn't show what's being deleted
findings.fix: Show contact name/role in confirmation dialog

findings.title: Bank parse error message lacks specific fix
findings.evidence: Generic 'not found' without listing supported formats
findings.fix: Show detected format and list supported alternatives

findings.title: Duplicate check feature buried, no CTA at page load
findings.evidence: runDupCheck exists but button not prominent
findings.fix: Add duplicate check to Registry toolbar

findings.title: Form focus state only changes border color
findings.evidence: .form-input:focus has border-color only, no ring/shadow
findings.fix: Add box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,0,0,.1) on focus

findings.title: Modal close buttons lack aria-label
findings.evidence: × symbol without aria-label='Закрити'
findings.fix: Add aria-label='Закрити' to all .modal-close

findings.title: Disabled buttons not visually distinct enough
findings.evidence: Only opacity:0.4, no background change
findings.fix: Add cursor:not-allowed and grey background

findings.title: Loading states lack aria-live announcements
findings.evidence: Loading divs have no aria-live='polite'
findings.fix: Add aria-live='polite' to loading indicators

findings.title: Bank format selector violates Hick's Law
findings.evidence: 10 flat options without grouping
findings.fix: Group by category or auto-detect from file

findings.title: DocGen type cards lack radio semantics
findings.evidence: Clickable divs without role='radio'
findings.fix: Add role='radio' + aria-checked

findings.title: Validation CTA 'Скасувати валідацію' unclear outcome
findings.evidence: Doesn't specify what happens to amounts
findings.fix: Change to 'Повернути до невалідовано'

findings.title: Inventory empty state lacks guidance
findings.evidence: Just 'Немає товарів' with no direction
findings.fix: Add 'Натисніть Додати товар вище'

findings.title: Debtors/creditors tables visually identical
findings.evidence: Amber/red text alone insufficient
findings.fix: Add distinct left border per section

findings.title: Modal focus not trapped for keyboard users
findings.evidence: Tab can escape modal to background elements
findings.fix: Implement focus trap in modals

strategic_moves: Add focus-visible + aria-labels across all interactive elements (accessibility floor)
Make validation/classification status scannable with badges and alert KPIs
Implement undo patterns for all destructive operations (merge, delete, ignore)
